contract.summary: 数据库导出的副本入口候选数据；精确 areapoi 优先，并导出目标区域 HintUiMapID

joins: areapoi: PoiDataType=1 且 PoiData 指向 journalinstance.ID 时作为精确副本 POI
journalinstanceentrance: areapoi 精确记录不存在时作为分翼入口候选
uimapassignment/uimap: 通过 AreaTableID 父链推断首个 System=0 UiMapID
where: Position_0 / Position_1 或 Pos_0 / Pos_1 非空
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个精确 areapoi 或 journalinstanceentrance 入口候选

entrances.sql: WITH instance_parent_ui_map AS ( SELECT CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) AS journal_instance_id, MIN(CASE WHEN CAST(COALESCE(um.ParentUiMapID, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CAST(um.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) END) AS instance_parent_hint_ui_map_id FROM journalinstance ji JOIN uimapassignment uma ON CAST(uma.MapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(ji.MapID AS INTEGER) JOIN uimap um ON CAST(um.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(ji.MapID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(COALESCE(um.System, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 GROUP BY CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) ), area_poi_entrance AS ( SELECT CAST(ap.ID AS INTEGER) AS entrance_id, CAST(ap.ID AS INTEGER) AS area_poi_id, CAST(ap.PoiData AS INTEGER) AS journal_instance_id, ji.Name_lang AS instance_name, CAST(ap.ContinentID AS INTEGER) AS world_map_id, CAST(COALESCE(ap.AreaID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS area_table_id, ap.Name_lang AS area_name, 0 AS parent_area_id, NULL AS parent_area_name, CAST(ap.Pos_0 AS REAL) AS world_x, CAST(ap.Pos_1 AS REAL) AS world_y, CAST(COALESCE(ap.Pos_2, 0) AS REAL) AS world_z, -1 AS faction, 'areapoi' AS source_key, 0 AS source_priority, ipm.instance_parent_hint_ui_map_id AS instance_parent_hint_ui_map_id FROM areapoi ap JOIN journalinstance ji ON CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(ap.PoiData AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN instance_parent_ui_map ipm ON ipm.journal_instance_id = CAST(ap.PoiData AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(COALESCE(ap.PoiDataType, 0) AS INTEGER) = 1 AND TRIM(COALESCE(ap.PoiData, '')) <> '' AND CAST(ap.PoiData AS INTEGER) > 0 AND TRIM(COALESCE(ap.ContinentID, '')) <> '' AND CAST(ap.ContinentID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND TRIM(COALESCE(ap.Pos_0, '')) <> '' AND TRIM(COALESCE(ap.Pos_1, '')) <> '' ), jie_entrance AS ( SELECT CAST(jie.ID AS INTEGER) AS entrance_id, NULL AS area_poi_id, CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) AS journal_instance_id, ji.Name_lang AS instance_name, CAST(jie.MapID AS INTEGER) AS world_map_id, CAST(jie.AreaTableID AS INTEGER) AS area_table_id, area.AreaName_lang AS area_name, CAST(COALESCE(area.ParentAreaID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS parent_area_id, parent.AreaName_lang AS parent_area_name, CAST(jie.Position_0 AS REAL) AS world_x, CAST(jie.Position_1 AS REAL) AS world_y, CAST(COALESCE(jie.Position_2, 0) AS REAL) AS world_z, CAST(COALESCE(jie.Faction, -1) AS INTEGER) AS faction, 'journalinstanceentrance' AS source_key, 1 AS source_priority, ipm.instance_parent_hint_ui_map_id AS instance_parent_hint_ui_map_id FROM journalinstanceentrance jie LEFT JOIN journalinstance ji ON CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN instance_parent_ui_map ipm ON ipm.journal_instance_id = CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN areatable area ON CAST(area.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(jie.AreaTableID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN areatable parent ON CAST(parent.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(area.ParentAreaID AS INTEGER) WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(jie.JournalInstanceID, '')) <> '' AND CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND TRIM(COALESCE(jie.MapID, '')) <> '' AND CAST(jie.MapID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND TRIM(COALESCE(jie.Position_0, '')) <> '' AND TRIM(COALESCE(jie.Position_1, '')) <> '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM area_poi_entrance ape WHERE ape.journal_instance_id = CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) ) ), entrance AS ( SELECT * FROM area_poi_entrance UNION ALL SELECT * FROM jie_entrance ), area_chain AS ( SELECT entrance_id, source_key, area_table_id AS candidate_area_id, 0 AS depth FROM entrance WHERE area_table_id > 0 UNION ALL SELECT ac.entrance_id, ac.source_key, CAST(a.ParentAreaID AS INTEGER) AS candidate_area_id, ac.depth + 1 AS depth FROM area_chain ac JOIN areatable a ON CAST(a.ID AS INTEGER) = ac.candidate_area_id WHERE CAST(a.ParentAreaID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND ac.depth < 8 ), area_ui_candidate AS ( SELECT ac.entrance_id, ac.source_key, CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER) AS hint_ui_map_id, ac.depth, CAST(COALESCE(uma.OrderIndex, 0) AS INTEGER) AS order_index, CAST(COALESCE(um.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_type FROM area_chain ac JOIN entrance e ON e.entrance_id = ac.entrance_id AND e.source_key = ac.source_key JOIN uimapassignment uma ON CAST(uma.MapID AS INTEGER) = e.world_map_id AND CAST(uma.AreaID AS INTEGER) = ac.candidate_area_id JOIN uimap um ON CAST(um.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(COALESCE(um.System, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 ), best_area_ui AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT auc.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY auc.entrance_id, auc.source_key ORDER BY auc.depth ASC, auc.ui_map_type DESC, auc.order_index ASC, auc.hint_ui_map_id ASC ) AS row_num FROM area_ui_candidate auc ) WHERE row_num = 1 ), coordinate_ui_candidate AS ( SELECT e.entrance_id, e.source_key, CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER) AS hint_ui_map_id, CASE WHEN CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(COALESCE(e.instance_parent_hint_ui_map_id, 0) AS INTEGER) THEN 0 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(uma.AreaID, 0) AS INTEGER) = CAST(COALESCE(e.area_table_id, 0) AS INTEGER) AND CAST(COALESCE(e.area_table_id, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 1 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(um.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN 2 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(um.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) = 2 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS candidate_rank, CAST(COALESCE(um.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_type, CAST(COALESCE(uma.OrderIndex, 0) AS INTEGER) AS order_index FROM entrance e JOIN uimapassignment uma ON CAST(uma.MapID AS INTEGER) = e.world_map_id JOIN uimap um ON CAST(um.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(COALESCE(um.System, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 AND e.world_x BETWEEN MIN(CAST(uma.Region_0 AS REAL), CAST(uma.Region_3 AS REAL)) AND MAX(CAST(uma.Region_0 AS REAL), CAST(uma.Region_3 AS REAL)) AND e.world_y BETWEEN MIN(CAST(uma.Region_1 AS REAL), CAST(uma.Region_4 AS REAL)) AND MAX(CAST(uma.Region_1 AS REAL), CAST(uma.Region_4 AS REAL)) ), best_coordinate_ui AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT cuc.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY cuc.entrance_id, cuc.source_key ORDER BY cuc.candidate_rank ASC, cuc.ui_map_type DESC, cuc.order_index ASC, cuc.hint_ui_map_id ASC ) AS row_num FROM coordinate_ui_candidate cuc ) WHERE row_num = 1 ) SELECT e.journal_instance_id, e.entrance_id, e.area_poi_id, e.instance_name, e.world_map_id, e.area_table_id, e.area_name, e.parent_area_id, e.parent_area_name, CAST(COALESCE(best_area_ui.hint_ui_map_id, e.instance_parent_hint_ui_map_id, best_coordinate_ui.hint_ui_map_id, 0) AS INTEGER) AS hint_ui_map_id, e.world_x, e.world_y, e.world_z, e.faction, e.source_key, e.source_priority FROM entrance e LEFT JOIN best_area_ui ON best_area_ui.entrance_id = e.entrance_id AND best_area_ui.source_key = e.source_key LEFT JOIN best_coordinate_ui ON best_coordinate_ui.entrance_id = e.entrance_id AND best_coordinate_ui.source_key = e.source_key ORDER BY e.journal_instance_id ASC, e.source_priority ASC, e.entrance_id ASC

where: 精确 areapoi 存在时排除同 journalInstanceID 的 journalinstanceentrance 候选
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个精确 areapoi 或 journalinstanceentrance 入口候选

change_log.summary: 初始契约版本：从 journalinstanceentrance 导出副本入口世界坐标
精确 areapoi 入口优先；修正厄运之槌 - 中心花园不应使用分翼门候选坐标
为 areapoi 来源补充 HintUiMapID：优先使用实例地图父 UiMap，确保点击后打开对应区域地图
